summary: David, what a week! You've now lost 58.8 pounds total—that's nearly a fifth of your starting weight—and you're maintaining a solid 2.1 pounds per week over the last two weeks. Your consistency with logging 11 days shows real commitment to this process, and that discipline is paying off as you approach 256 pounds. Next week, I'd love to see you aim for a full 14 days of logging so we can spot any patterns that might help optimize your results even further. You're doing the hard work and it's showing. Keep leaning on your Dexcom and Garmin data—they're your best friends right now, and you're using them exactly right.
